purpose: Prepare the next MVP gate by proving that MVP-02 adapted drafts are ready for owner decision about release-or-routing candidate review, without granting that review, release, routing, manifest, or runtime approval.

preflight_checks.meaning: All selected candidates have non-runtime adapted drafts and checklist evidence.
The drafts still point to pinned MIT-licensed source evidence and recorded upstream hashes.
The batch has one recipe-only candidate and two merge candidates; none are approved payloads.
Candidate IDs are not approved Skill directories.
Candidate IDs are not release payloads and are not executable routing targets.
Continuation toward MVP closeout is not enough to enter release-or-routing candidate review.

candidate_review_targets.recommended_review_bias: Prefer recipe/routing proposal or reference-only unless evidence proves a separate approved Skill payload is materially better than existing PRD, issue, TDD, review, and launch guidance.
Prefer merge into existing documentation, architecture, handoff, and ubiquitous-language guidance unless a standalone Skill gap is proven.
Prefer merge into existing review, CI/CD, performance, observability, and security routing rules unless a standalone quality Skill gap is proven.

requested_scope_if_approved: enter candidate-specific release-or-routing review for the three MVP-02 adapted drafts
decide per draft whether it remains reference-only, becomes a recipe/routing proposal, merges into an existing approved Skill, becomes a release-payload candidate, or is rejected
record the rationale, evidence, rejected alternatives, and next required gate for each candidate
prepare proposed diffs only if the owner separately approves a manifest, routing, or approved-payload change
explicitly_not_requested: install or sync live Agent environments
approve, release, or publish any candidate payload
redistribute upstream source text as approved curated payload
safe_approval_phrases: 批准进入 MVP-03 release/routing 候选审查阶段
Approve MVP-03 release-or-routing candidate review only
next_required_evidence_if_approved: rationale for release payload, recipe/routing proposal, merge, reference-only, or reject
explicit record that live install, publication, and source redistribution remain unchanged unless separately approved
still_disallowed: install or sync live Agent environments
approve, release, or publish any candidate payload
redistribute upstream source text as approved curated payload
